2021-22 Illinois State Redbirds Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 13-20 (5-13, 8th in MVC MBB)

Coach: Brian Jones (2-5), Dan Muller (11-15)

PS/G: 74.2 (92nd of 358)

PA/G: 74.7 (312th of 358)

SRS: -0.78 (167th of 358)

SOS: 0.74 (129th of 358)

ORtg: 104.4 (144th of 358)

DRtg: 105.2 (291st of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000
